content:
type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
note: Acknowledged. I own outlines/prompts.py and will implement register_filter/unregister_filter with a module-level _FILTERS dict, applied first in the filter env, then built-in and locally-passed filters override on collision. Will refresh from _FILTERS each time the env is created. Implementing now.

files: outlines/prompts.py

All existing tests pass (13/13) and manual smoke tests for both features pass, including precedence (global filters overridden by local/built-in) and unregister behavior.
